Source: Where_Master_v6x.xlsx (Merge sheet) · Reference year 2020 (WPP/WDI/GDL) · Generated 2026-07-10 · TLTL1: 237 · TLTL2: 2,524 · TLTL3: 5,230
Production World / TL1 national (WPP/WDI) Experimental TL2 / TL3 subnational (provisional — watermark travels with every export)
⚠ World/TL1 national weights are Production (WPP/WDI). All TL2/TL3 subnational weights are Experimental — provisional, the watermark and source_pedigree travel with every export. Coverage: TL3 nodes resolved to a real TL2 parent = 5161/5230.
Pedigree (NUSAP-lite): NUSAP-lite: every node carries source_pedigree (Pedigree) + a public badge (Assessment). TL3→TL2 nesting is resolved by source-routed deterministic rules (parentage_rule); parentage_state flags any node that could not bind to a TL2 and falls back to its TL1 country. Mixed parentage is recorded, not hidden — an analytically useful indicator has mixed pedigree by nature.
TL3 parentage — resolved: 5,161 · tl1_fallback: 69

OconEco · FAND Where-Tree · The badge steps down as you descend the spine; the accounting identity does not.
TL2↔TL3 nesting binds when a validated crosswalk is provided (Where_Source_Inventory); the flagged FIXTURE node demonstrates the TL3 export pathway.
